brand_identity.name: RED RIBBON OPS PORTAL
brand_identity.aesthetic: Clean Industrial, Dark Mode Sidebar, High Contrast, Red Accents

headings.usage: Page titles, Card headers, KPI values

body.usage: Table data, Chat messages, Form labels

primary.name: Ribbon Red
primary.usage: Primary buttons, Active states, Notification badges, Key highlights

layout.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Left, Fixed, Dark) + Top Header (Sticky, Light) + Main Content Area (Scrollable, Light)

buttons.primary: bg-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-700 text-white shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-3 py-2

inputs.style: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-100 focus:border-rose-600 rounded-md

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-slate-500 is not used on white backgrounds for essential text. Use text-slate-600 minimum.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (ring-rose-200).

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, stick to solid clean colors.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Use Shadcn UI components as the base, but override styles to match the Red Ribbon theme.
Sidebar must be dark mode (slate-900), content area light mode.
Order Detail page must have a dedicated 'Files' tab and 'Activity' tab.
Use 'Badge' component for Order Status (Pending, In Progress, Review, Completed).
